provenance.scope: IOCs observable from the DC01 RAM capture alone — the fair denominator for a memory-only run. loot.zip (workstation, disk-only) and other-host artifacts are excluded.

ips.context: RDP brute-force source and HTTP malware delivery (sessions/sockets and strings in RAM)
coreupdate.exe C2 destination (live connection or socket remnants in RAM)

files.context: running process / service binary visible in pslist, cmdline, and service records

files.name: secret.zip
files.context: created and deleted on DC01 minutes before; MFT/strings remnants may persist in RAM — counted honestly even if hard to recover
